discover.title: Discover Our Olive Oil
discover.content:
Our extra virgin olive oil comes from carefully selected olives harvested during the second season — the precise moment when green, red, and black varieties reach their perfect balance of maturity. This meticulous timing ensures an oil that is harmonious, stable, and generously aromatic.

A Unique Blend

ZABRA blends Arbequina and Local olive varieties to achieve a stable golden color and a smooth, subtly fruity flavor profile with a peppery finish. Each batch is pressed within hours of harvest to preserve the full freshness of the aromas.

Nutritional Profile

Naturally rich in polyphenols and monounsaturated fatty acids, our olive oil actively contributes to:

  • Cardiovascular system protection
  • Reduction of LDL cholesterol
  • A natural supply of antioxidants
  • Better absorption of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E, K)

Tasting Tips

To reveal its full richness, drizzle it over warm bread, a fresh salad, or a tagine at the end of cooking. It elevates every dish without overpowering the flavors.

why-zabira.title: Why Choose ZABRA?
why-zabira.content:
At ZABRA, every bottle tells the story of an artisanal craft passed down through generations. We don't mass-produce — we select.

Second Season Harvest

Unlike early industrial harvests, we wait for the second season of maturation. This longer process allows the olives to develop superior aromatic complexity, with notes of ripe fruit, fresh grass, and sweet almond.

Supervised Extraction in Beni Mellal

Our olives are cold-pressed in the mills of Beni Mellal, a region renowned for centuries for the exceptional quality of its olive groves. Each extraction is personally supervised to guarantee acidity below 0.8%.

Packaging Designed for Quality

Our choice of white food-grade steel canisters is deliberate:

  • Total protection against light and UV rays that degrade polyphenols
  • Thermal insulation that preserves freshness and aromas
  • Durable material that is 100% recyclable

This is not simply olive oil. It is the result of rigorous selection, an exceptional terroir, and a personal commitment to excellence.

recipe.title: Olive Oil Recipes
recipe.content:
Quick Mediterranean Marinade

A simple, fragrant marinade to elevate grilled meats and vegetables.

  • 4 tbsp ZABRA extra virgin olive oil
  • 3 finely minced garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp ground cumin
  • Juice of one fresh lemon
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper

Mix all ingredients and marinate your meats or vegetables for 20 to 30 minutes. Grill over high heat for perfect caramelization.

Daily Wellness Ritual

One tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil every morning on an empty stomach offers remarkable benefits:

  • Supports digestion and protects the gastric lining
  • Promotes heart health through omega-9 fatty acids
  • Hydrates skin from within for a radiant complexion

ZABRA Signature Vinaigrette

Emulsify 3 parts ZABRA oil with 1 part balsamic vinegar, a touch of Dijon mustard, and a pinch of sea salt. Perfect over an heirloom tomato salad or fresh mozzarella.

discover.title: Discover Argan Oil
discover.content:
ZABRA argan oil is extracted from the fruits of ancestral argan trees in the Souss region of southwestern Morocco — a millennia-old tree classified as a UNESCO World Heritage species. Our oil is available in two distinct versions, each with its own unique properties.

Cosmetic Argan

Obtained through cold pressing without roasting, this version retains the full range of its active compounds. Its light, non-greasy texture absorbs quickly into the skin for deep hydration. It is exceptionally rich in:

  • Vitamin E — a powerful anti-aging antioxidant
  • Essential fatty acids (omega-6 and omega-9)
  • Schottenol — a rare molecule that promotes cellular regeneration

Culinary Argan

The kernels are delicately roasted before pressing, revealing an intense nutty flavor and a deep amber color. This oil elevates your dishes — a simple drizzle over couscous, a salad, or grilled fish transforms every bite into a unique taste experience.

A Biodiversity Treasure

Our argan trees grow in the protected forests of Essaouira, classified as a biosphere reserve. Each tree produces barely a few liters of oil per year, giving every bottle exceptional value.

why-zabira.title: The ZABRA Argan Excellence
why-zabira.content:
Argan oil is one of the most counterfeited products in the world. At ZABRA, we have made absolute authenticity our core promise.

Personal Kernel Selection

Every batch of kernels is inspected and hand-selected. We systematically discard any kernels that are damaged, immature, or of insufficient quality. This rigorous sorting guarantees a pure oil, free from bitterness or off-odors.

Supervised Cold Pressing

Extraction is done exclusively through mechanical cold pressing, without chemical solvents or excessive heat. The temperature never exceeds 45°C, preserving the full spectrum of nutrients and active compounds.

Zero Waste Philosophy

Our process valorizes 100% of the argan fruit:

  • Pure oil — the premium product you receive
  • Argan paste (Amlou) — a delicious spread with honey and almonds
  • Dry scrub — a natural body exfoliant

Choosing ZABRA means supporting a transparent supply chain that respects the land, local communities, and the environment.

recipe.title: Uses & Care Routines
recipe.content:
Restorative Hair Mask

A deep treatment to revive dry and damaged hair.

  • 2 tbsp ZABRA cosmetic argan oil
  • 1 tbsp pure honey
  • 1 egg yolk

Mix and apply to damp hair, from roots to ends. Wrap in a warm towel and leave for 30 minutes. Rinse with a gentle shampoo. Repeat once a week.

Anti-Aging Face Serum

Apply 3 to 4 drops of cosmetic argan oil to a clean, slightly damp face, morning and evening. Massage with upward circular motions. The Schottenol naturally present in the oil stimulates cellular regeneration and visibly reduces fine lines.

Hand & Nail Care

Massage a few drops into your hands and cuticles before bed. Argan oil strengthens brittle nails and deeply softens dry hands.

In the Kitchen: Amlou

Blend roasted almonds with ZABRA culinary argan oil and honey until you get a smooth, creamy paste. This traditional Berber recipe is enjoyed at breakfast, spread on warm bread — an absolute delight.

discover.title: Discover Medjool Dates
discover.content:
The Medjool is considered the queen of dates — a noble and generous fruit cultivated for millennia in the oases of the Moroccan desert. Our dates come from the family palm groves of Errachidia, in the Ziz Valley, where the arid climate and rich soils create ideal conditions for an exceptional fruit.

A Unique Flavor Profile

Each ZABRA Medjool date offers a soft, melt-in-your-mouth texture, with naturally caramelized notes and an intense sweetness that never becomes cloying. Its generous size and thin skin distinguish it from all other varieties.

Nutritional Benefits

Far more than a treat, the Medjool date is a true superfood:

  • Magnesium & Potassium — help regulate blood pressure
  • Natural fiber — promotes healthy digestion
  • Quick energy — ideal before or after exercise
  • Zero cholesterol and zero added fats

It's the perfect snack — natural, nourishing, and absolutely delicious.

why-zabira.title: The ZABRA Difference
why-zabira.content:
In a market flooded with dates of varying quality, ZABRA stands as a benchmark for selection and traceability.

Second Season Harvest

We wait for the second season of maturation — the moment when natural sugar content reaches its peak. This patience yields a date that is sweeter, more melt-in-your-mouth, and more aromatic than early harvests.

Piece-by-Piece Selection

Every single date is individually inspected. We only keep fruits with a generous size, intact skin, and perfectly soft flesh. This manual sorting guarantees consistent quality, batch after batch.

Two Exceptional Varieties

  • Pure Medjool — the date in its most noble form, with absolutely no additives
  • Pista-Velvet — a gourmet creation where the date is delicately filled with a creamy pistachio and biscuit filling, for a premium indulgent experience

Every ZABRA box is a gesture of elegance — perfect to gift or to savor.

recipe.title: Recipe Ideas
recipe.content:
Energizing Smoothie Bowl

A healthy, indulgent, and filling breakfast.

  • 4 ZABRA Medjool dates, pitted
  • 1 ripe banana
  • 150 ml plain yogurt
  • Toppings: granola, fresh fruit, chia seeds

Blend the dates, banana, and yogurt until smooth and creamy. Pour into a bowl and top with your favorites. A treat ready in 5 minutes.

Date Spread

A natural, healthy alternative to refined sugar.

  • 6 pitted Medjool dates
  • 80 ml hot water
  • A pinch of cinnamon

Soak the dates in hot water for 10 minutes, then blend until smooth. Spread on pancakes, crêpes, or toast. Keeps for one week in the fridge.

Immunity Booster

Blend 3 dates with a banana, a piece of fresh ginger, and 200 ml of almond milk. This powerful smoothie strengthens your natural defenses and provides lasting energy throughout the day.
